summary_en: 3,000,000 shares acquired (2.15% of shares outstanding), ¥4,829.5M total, completing the authorized program. Final block: 393,900 shares, ¥594.9M, 2026-05-01 to 2026-05-22, open-market purchase. Program authorized 2025-12-26 for ¥5.5B ceiling and 3M share limit through 2026-06-30; full limit reached.
title_en: Notice of Share Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition (Self-Held Shares)
translation_en_brief: DCM Holdings completed a share buyback program authorized by the board on 2025-12-26. The program permitted acquisition of up to 3 million shares (2.15% of outstanding shares) for up to ¥5.5 billion through 2026-06-30 via open-market purchase under a transaction-delegation contract. As of 2026-05-22, the company had acquired the full 3 million share authorization, totaling ¥4,829.5 million. The final execution block in the period 2026-05-01 to 2026-05-22 consisted of 393,900 shares purchased for ¥594.9 million. The buyback has concluded.
